title: Regenerate synthetic training data for 17 PoC segments
description: The old synthetic data (data/synthetic/generator.py) was built for 10 whole-road IDs (road_01 through road_10). Current pipeline uses 17 sub-segment IDs (road_01a through road_06d). ROAD_ENCODE in model_service.py has been updated. Generator has been rewritten with correct profiles, peak hours, and Karachi events for all 17 segments. Next step: run 'python data/synthetic/generator.py' to insert ~1.2M rows into Supabase traffic_readings table, then call POST /api/v1/models/train to retrain XGBoost on the new data. Old model .pkl files in data/models/ are stale — do not use until retrained.

title: Rebuild ROAD_SEGMENTS from verified mapping file
description: A new mapping file will be drawn and pushed to GitHub with corrected road segment coordinates and via waypoints. Next session: pull that file and rebuild ROAD_SEGMENTS in data_pipeline.py and tools/map_preview.py from it. Then visually verify all via waypoint coordinates on the /map preview. Current waypoints were estimated and some are misplaced (road_05a confirmed wrong side of road).
notes: Session 2026-05-02: map_preview.py ROAD_SEGMENTS synced with pipeline (was stale). road_05b via fixed to 24.921277,67.094047 (was routing 5.8km/h walking pace, now 43.8km/h). road_05a and road_06c via waypoints confirmed fixed. road_06d congestion behaviour confirmed correct (localized bottleneck near origin inflating segment ratio — expected behaviour). REMAINING: visual re-verification on /map recommended after any future coordinate changes.

title: Government Intelligence Dashboard — Lovable build
description: React dashboard built in Lovable. Four zones: Google Maps with runtime Directions API polylines coloured by congestion_level, summary panel with AI briefing (Claude API), road intelligence table with SHAP root cause, Ask the System NL interface. Dark theme. Connects to heros-initiative-backend.replit.app/api/v1/. Tech stack: React, Google Maps JS API, Recharts, Tailwind, Axios, Anthropic Claude API.

title: FastAPI Backend — All V1 endpoints
description: traffic, pipeline, predict, models/train, accuracy endpoints — all live
close_reason: Complete. All V1 endpoints live at heros-initiative-backend.replit.app
